productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Adna Ss Tee White T-Shirts
description: Composition White short Sleeve sleeved Round Neck neck t-shirt made of 100% polyester, with fabric tape detailing on the inseam of the neckline, brand name and logo Printed on the left chest, three black stripes on the sleeves signifying the adidas logo and contoured black panels on the sides of the chest Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water below 30 degrees, using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Cool iron Do not iron directly on print/trims/ logo Do not dry clean This sporty white t-shirt from adidas makes for the perfect wear to the gym, when playing and even to the pizza joint! The black panels jazz up this sleek tee, catapulting you to the limelight. Pair it with jeans, Short Sleeves or tracks for a great look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6.1'', Chest- 38.5”
